title: General Essentials Pack
description: Addon Pack for FVTM with general essential items, parts and tools.
body:
GEP is the default Addon Pack for FVTM.

It contains some essential parts and materials.

1.12.2 -> Forge    
1.20.1 -> Forge    
26.1.+ -> Fabric    

**Unless you have other packs providing FVTM materials like keys, impacts, canisters and parts like engines, you should install this pack.**

FVTM packs get installed into the `/mods/` folder on 1.20.1, they are not a mod by themself, FVTM handles all content loading and registation.
